text:
To determine how many hours Kris still needs to play to earn the video game achievement, we can break down her playing schedule over the given time periods.

First, we calculate the total number of hours she has already played:

1. For the first 2 weeks (14 days), she plays for half an hour every day:
\[ 14 \text{ days} \times 0.5 \text{ hours/day} = 7 \text{ hours} \]

2. For the next week (7 days), she plays for 2 hours every day:
\[ 7 \text{ days} \times 2 \text{ hours/day} = 14 \text{ hours} \]

So, the total number of hours she has already played is:
\[ 7 \text{ hours} + 14 \text{ hours} = 21 \text{ hours} \]

Kris needs to play a total of 30 hours to earn the achievement. Therefore, the number of additional hours she needs to play is:
\[ 30 \text{ hours} - 21 \text{ hours} = 9 \text{ hours} \]

Thus, Kris still needs to play \(\boxed{9}\) hours to earn the achievement.
